details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected per governance contract. All other top-level dirs (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) and reports/audit/ are present.
reports/board/ missing. memory_bank/ has key docs (6 files). .cursor/automations/ exists with README.md and 5 automation specs. reports/audit/ exists with 19 entries.

moltbot/ directory exists with 5 Python modules (board.py, memory_evolution.py, orchestrator.py, promotion_discipline.py, sentinel.py) plus agents/ subdir. Scripts reference moltbot: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py. Config files in board/eod/out/ also reference clawdbot/moltbot. MEMORY_BANK_ALPACA.md still documents moltbot workflows. Excluded: reports/audit docs, reports/daily evidence, and docs/ files that document removal history.
